#  Search Submittals (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the Submittals tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool from your Android mobile device.
  2. Tap **Search** ![Icon Search Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a1567256d48c74dc58bb9c7434e387f/a8d92f24d7f05df73dfd626cc536b400/icon-search-android.png?fm=webp&h=18).
  3. Type a keyword or phrase into the search box. _Note:_ Procore searches the following fields for matches:
     * Title
     * Description
  4. Tap a submittal to view more details.


## See Also
  * [View Submittal PDF Attachments (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/view-submittal-pdf-attachments-android)
  * [Download Submittals Attachments (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/download-submittals-attachments-android)
  * [Email Submittals (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/email-submittals-android)
title: Search Submittals (Android)
description: How to search for an find items in the project level Submittals tool from an Android mobile device.
